_comment: Changelings guild layer for 3s. Like Necromancers, this guild has NO private MIP tag - vitals ride the mud-wide FFF composite feed (A=hp C=sp E=gp1 G=gp2). Maxes self-calibrate from peak observed value. Cascade rule REPLACE (character file wins).
Pool labels: HP/SP verified from score; Density, Flux still GUESSED (value didn't echo to a named gscore line) - rename live.
Attack: requires an explicit target ('kill <mob>'); plain 'kill' won't work. autoattack_command left empty so Hunt parses the room and sends 'kill <keyword>'.

Pool labels CONFIRMED 2026-06-16: the two guessed bars are really Protoplasm (gp1) and Stamina (gp2). Order (which is gp1 vs gp2) to be verified against a 'score' capture. The Agent's 30% flee watches BOTH.

Agent: heal at agent_heal_pct 50 (the per-round auto-morph keeps HP topped, so no need to heal early), flee by leaving the room at 30% protoplasm/stamina (agent_flee_command empty = engine picks an exit). Survival lives in changeling.py hooks: morph 'triceratops' (capped tank form) when STAMINA < agent_triceratops_pct (60), stay there for the fight, then agent_ensure_form swaps back after combat; otherwise routine HP heal = consume bioplast if any else bare 'morph'. Attack form = the form closest to FF 30 but not yet there (triceratops is capped at 30, only used to survive).
gags: You have no need to reform as you are in perfect health!
